/home/runner/work/eckit/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -fPIC  -pipe -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-sign-compare -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/eckit_maths.dir/link.d  -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -shared -Wl,-soname,libeckit_maths.so -o ../../../lib/libeckit_maths.so CMakeFiles/eckit_maths.dir/FloatingPointExceptions.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_maths.dir/Lapack.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../lib" ../../../lib/libeckit.so -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -ldl
